prompt_md: Arrange the events of a single streamed response in the correct order, from the user's action to the finished message.

items: The server emits the first chunk of the answer as soon as it is produced
The user clicks Send; the client opens a stream and submits the request
The server sends a final "done" marker and closes the stream
The client appends each arriving chunk to the screen as it is received
The client sees the done marker and finalises the message
